text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, I see Oguri Cap assumedly headed
to the academy, but as she approaches, she
marches right past its gate.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That was a close one. You're a real lifesaver... Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't fall asleep last night, so instead of
sheep, I decided to count takoyaki.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then I counted taiyaki, and then carrots, and
then hamburgers...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Before I knew it, it was morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap looks sleep-deprived throughout the
remainder of the day.
